hero.title: Your space,
hero.subtitle: Tailored solutions for modern and functional spaces. Carpentry, painting, plumbing and more — delivered by passionate professionals.

servicesPreview.title: Our expertise
servicesPreview.subtitle: From full renovations to targeted work, we cover every building trade.

renovation.title: Building renovation
renovation.desc: Complete transformation of your residential and commercial spaces, from design to finish.

menuiserie.title: Carpentry
menuiserie.desc: Custom fabrication and installation of interior and exterior joinery, doors, windows and fittings.

peinture.title: Painting
peinture.desc: Application of wall coverings, decorative paints and plaster to enhance your interiors.

plafonds.title: Ceilings
plafonds.desc: Installation of suspended ceilings, stretch ceilings and decorative tiles for a refined finish.

plomberie.title: Plumbing
plomberie.desc: Installation, repair and maintenance of all your sanitary equipment and water networks.

carrelage.title: Tiling
carrelage.desc: Floor and wall tiling, faience and mosaic for bathrooms, kitchens and common areas.

debouchage.title: Drain unblocking
debouchage.desc: Fast intervention to unblock pipes, sinks, toilets and drainage systems.

electricite.title: Electrical work
electricite.desc: Standards compliance, installation of electrical panels, wiring and indoor/outdoor lighting.

why.title: Excellence at every step
why.subtitle: We put our expertise at the service of your projects with rigour and transparency.

quality.title: Guaranteed quality
quality.desc: Every intervention is carried out with the most suitable materials and most efficient techniques.

expertise.title: Proven expertise
expertise.desc: Over 10 years of experience in building renovation and fitting-out in Belgium.

devis.title: Free & fast quote
devis.desc: Get a clear and detailed estimate of your project within 48 hours, with no commitment.

ctaBanner.title: Ready to transform your space?
ctaBanner.subtitle: Contact us today for a free and personalised quote.

about.heroSubtitle: A company built on a passion for work done right.
about.story1: Wiali Rénovation is a company specialised in building renovation, created to meet the growing needs of demanding clients looking for quality and reliability.
about.story2: With a team of qualified and experienced professionals, we handle all types of work: carpentry, painting, ceilings, plumbing, tiling, drain unblocking and electrical work.
about.story3: Our approach is based on listening, transparency and commitment to every client — from the first contact through to final delivery.

trust.title: Trust
trust.desc: We build lasting relationships based on honesty and transparency.

precision.title: Precision
precision.desc: Every detail matters. We work with rigour to deliver results that meet your expectations.

respect.title: Respect
respect.desc: Respect for deadlines, budgets and our clients' living spaces.

innovation.title: Innovation
innovation.desc: We adopt modern techniques to offer you the best solutions.

servicesPage.heroSubtitle: A complete range of services for all your renovation projects.
servicesPage.tagline: Tailored solutions for modern and functional spaces.

contact.heroSubtitle: Describe your project and receive a free quote within 48h.
